title: Paper-52: Mass and Yukawa 4 — Neutrino Masses, Seesaw, and PMNS Structure

D_claims.claim: verify_seesaw_mass_formula: Validate light neutrino mass formula for all seesaw types.
verify_pmns_unitarity: Check PMNS matrix unitarity and heavy-mixing corrections.
verify_seesaw_scale_bounds: Confirm seesaw scale against oscillation and CMB data.
